actions.text: Malcolm Webster, from Surrey, was jailed for a minimum of 30 years for murdering Claire Morris in 1994.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: he set fire to the vehicle with his unconscious wife inside it before later receiving an insurance payout.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Midfielder Dylan McGeouch has signed a two-year contract extension with Scottish Premiership club Hibernian.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The 27-year-old picked up the injury in the Rams' goalless draw against Aston Villa on Saturday.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man has died after being assaulted in Waterford.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 45-year-old man has been arrested and is due to appear at Lisburn Magistrates' Court on Monday.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Clementine Schneidermann won the Leica Oskar Barnack Award for her project entitled The Unbearable, the Sadness and the Rest.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Liverpool will check on Sadio Mane's fitness before deciding whether to involve him in the game against Chelsea.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Almost a quarter of women in Wales received their cervical screening results within four weeks.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Manchester United goalkeeper Sergio Romero has signed a new contract until 2019.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A 24-year-old man has been charged with the murder of Steven McKinnon.
